name: legal-ops-platform
description: AI-powered legal operations platform - alternative to LegalZoom

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && python -m flake8 . && python -m black --check .
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.format:backend: cd backend && python -m black . && python -m isort .
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.setup:db: cd backend && python -m alembic upgrade head && python -m alembic revision --autogenerate -m 'Initial migration'
scripts.migrate: cd backend && python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.shell:db: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U legalops_user -d legalops

author: Legal Ops Team
